_note: FinOps cost model for compute-cost.mjs. Prices are public Anthropic API list prices (USD per million tokens) as of 2026-06; update when pricing changes. All computed figures are ESTIMATES (token counts come from dashboard estimates, not billed actuals).
scope_note: Covers the framework's own pipeline run cost (agent token usage per wave). Does NOT cover product-runtime cost of projects built on the framework — that lives in each product's own FinOps config.

cost_model.token_split_assumption: 50/50 input/output split applied uniformly (v1). Refine with real input/output breakdown when the dashboard captures it per wave.

anomaly._note: A wave whose estimated cost exceeds multiplier × rolling median over the last window emits a cost_anomaly event.
